2015-T1-P1-S12.trunk: 形式主语：it is bizarre that wealthy aristocratic families should still be the symbolic heart …（…仍是…的象征核心，实在离奇）
structure: └ 定语从句〔when，修饰 a time〕：when Thomas Piketty and other economists are warning of rising inequality and the increasing power of inherited wealth
主句（形式主语 it）：it is bizarre that wealthy aristocratic families should still be the symbolic heart of modern democratic states
└ 主语从句(that)：that wealthy aristocratic families should still be the symbolic heart of modern democratic states
2015-T1-P1-S12.logic: At a time when… 时间状语（when 定语从句修饰 a time）；it 形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句；should 表「竟然/居然」的情感色彩。
notes: when 引导定语从句修饰 a time（不是状语从句）。
it is bizarre that…：it 形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句。
should still be：should 表惊讶/不解（竟然还…），非「应该」；warn of 警示。

2015-T1-P1-S16.trunk: 让步+强调句：While …, it is the British royals who have most to fear …（尽管…，最该惧怕的是英国王室）
structure: 让步状语从句(While)：While Europe's monarchies will no doubt be smart enough to survive for some time to come
主句（强调句）：it is the British royals who have most to fear from the Spanish example
2015-T1-P1-S16.logic: While 引导让步状语从句（尽管）；主句是强调句 it is X who…（强调 the British royals）。
notes: While 引导让步状语从句（尽管）。
it is the British royals who…：强调句（强调 the British royals），删 it is…who 后句子仍成立。
smart enough to survive：enough to do；some time to come 未来一段时间。

2015-T1-P1-S9.trunk: S+V：most royal families have survived（多数王室得以存续）
structure: 状语(unlike…)：But unlike their absolutist counterparts in the Gulf and Asia
主句：most royal families have survived
原因状语从句(because)：because they allow voters to avoid the difficult search for a non-controversial but respected public figure
└ allow sb to do：allow voters to avoid the difficult search
2015-T1-P1-S9.logic: unlike… 作状语（与…不同）；主句 most royal families have survived；because 原因从句，allow sb to do（让选民得以避免…）。
notes: unlike their absolutist counterparts… 作状语（与海湾和亚洲的专制君主不同）。
because 引导原因状语从句；allow sb to do（让某人得以…）。
non-controversial but respected：并列形容词修饰 public figure（无争议却受尊敬的）。
